name: The Grand Marina Hotel
profile: The Grand Marina Hotel is a 220-room, 4-star independent property on the waterfront in Charleston, SC. ADR $245. 8,000 sq ft of meeting space, a rooftop restaurant, 60% leisure / 40% corporate mix. We struggle with mid-week occupancy and want to grow group business and corporate negotiated accounts within a 200-mile radius.

name: Summit Lodge Aspen
profile: Summit Lodge Aspen is a 95-room luxury boutique mountain hotel. ADR $685, 74% occupancy, heavily ski-season weighted. 3,200 sq ft of meeting space. We want to grow shoulder season (April-May, Oct-Nov), build luxury consortia partnerships, and attract small executive retreats.

name: Harbor Suites Boston
profile: Harbor Suites Boston is a 310-room select-service hotel near the seaport. ADR $219, 81% occupancy. 12,000 sq ft of meeting space. Strong weekday corporate base; we want to grow weekend leisure, win mid-size association meetings, and improve our Booking.com and Expedia performance.
